analysis: The project is a static website about black holes with existing HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files. The theme should focus on black holes, animated objects, slides, and pages. The current CSS and HTML need enhancements to fully implement the black hole theme with animations and interactive elements.

improvements.description: Add CSS animations for black hole visuals, including swirling effects, glowing elements, and animated slides to enhance the cosmic theme.
Enhance the HTML structure to include interactive elements like animated black hole visuals, slide navigation, and a mobile-friendly menu with a hamburger icon.
Implement JavaScript functions to handle slide animations, interactive black hole visuals, and mobile menu toggling for a seamless user experience.
